tasks.label: Start Frontend Dev Server
tasks.command: pkill -f 'node.*vite' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'node index.js' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npm start

tasks.label: Check Port 3000
tasks.command: python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(); r=s.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1',3000)); print('PORT 3000:', 'IN USE' if r==0 else 'FREE'); s.close()"

tasks.label: Free Port 3000
tasks.command: lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN; echo '---'; pkill -f 'node.*vite' 2>/dev/null && echo 'killed vite' || echo 'nothing to kill'; sleep 1; lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN || echo 'port 3000 is now FREE'

tasks.label: Check Ports
tasks.command: python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(); r=s.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1',27017)); print('MongoDB port 27017:', 'OPEN' if r==0 else 'CLOSED'); s.close(); r2=s.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1',4000)); print('Backend port 4000:', 'OPEN' if r2==0 else 'CLOSED')"

tasks.label: Backend Error Check
tasks.command: cd server && node --input-type=module < index.js 2>&1; echo EXIT:$?

tasks.label: Backend Import Check
tasks.command: cd server && node -e "import('./index.js').catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })" 2>&1; echo EXIT:$?

tasks.label: Check Port 4000
tasks.command: python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(); r=s.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1',4000)); print('Backend port 4000:', 'OPEN' if r==0 else 'CLOSED'); s.close()"

tasks.label: Backend Restart
tasks.command: pkill -f 'node.*index.js' 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; cd server && npm start
